prompt_text:
### Demographics: 54-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.2 kg; Height 157.4 cm; BMI 21.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 135/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.2%; 9 months ago 7.6%; 6 months ago 7.1%; 3 months ago 6.6%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 224mg/dL; 9 months ago 189mg/dL; 6 months ago 141mg/dL; 3 months ago 153mg/dL; current 105mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 51.2kg; 9 months ago 51.3kg; 6 months ago 53.1kg; 3 months ago 53.3kg; current 54.2kg), Height (12 months ago 157.4cm; 9 months ago 157.4cm; 6 months ago 157.4cm; 3 months ago 157.4cm; current 157.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 135mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 135mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 12U/L; 9 months ago 10U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 14U/L), AST (12 months ago 28U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 46mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 47mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; current 47mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 194mg/g; 9 months ago 240mg/g; 6 months ago 179mg/g; 3 months ago 230mg/g; current 164mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 92mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 60mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 60mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 166mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 166mg/dL; 3 months ago 162mg/dL; current 155mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.3g/dL; current 13.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.99 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
